primary_function: Create beautiful visual art in .png and .pdf documents using design philosophy. You should use this skill when the user asks to create a poster, piece of art, design, or other static piece. Create original visual designs, never copying existing artists' work to avoid copyright violations.
suggested_aec_gates: Verify output includes both .md philosophy file and visual artifact (.pdf or .png)
Confirm design philosophy is 4-6 substantial paragraphs
Ensure text in visual artifacts is minimal and integrated as design element
Validate visual work demonstrates master-level craftsmanship and appears meticulously created
Confirm output avoids redundant repetition of design concepts within philosophy
Verify visual expression prioritizes form, space, color, and composition over text
Ensure aesthetic movement has clear 1-2 word name
Confirm subtle conceptual references are sophisticated and non-literal
Validate final artifacts appear as museum or magazine quality art objects
trigger_text: Create beautiful visual art in .png and .pdf documents using design philosophy. You should use this skill when the user asks to create a poster, piece of art, design, or other static piece. Create original visual designs, never copying existing artists' work to avoid copyright violations.
